phrases.text_local: Combien de bières y a-t-il au menu ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh byair ee-ah-TEEL oh muh-NOO
phrases.cultural_note: Delirium holds the world record with over 2,000 beer varieties. From Belgian tripels to Japanese rice beers — every style is represented.

responses.english: Over two thousand different beers on the menu.
responses.phonetic: ploo duh duh MEEL byehr dee-fay-RAHNT oh muh-NOO
responses.local: Plus de deux mille bières différentes au menu.

phrases.cultural_note: Delirium Night happens every Thursday — the bar stays open until 4am with special events and themed drinks.

responses.phonetic: say too lay zhuh-DEE swahr, zhoos-kah katr uhr doo mah-TAN
responses.local: C'est tous les jeudis soir, jusqu'à quatre heures du matin.

phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander une bière typique ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mohn-DAY un byair tee-PEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Staff are knowledgeable. Ask for something local like a Trappist Rochefort, or a seasonal lambic from Cantillon.

responses.english: I recommend a trappist beer like Rochefort 10, or a seasonal lambic from Cantillon.
responses.phonetic: zhuh ray-ko-MAHN-duh luh spay-see-ah-lee-TAY loh-KAL, say tek-seh-LAHN
responses.local: Je recommande une bière trappiste comme la Rochefort 10, ou une lambic de saison de Cantillon.

phrases.cultural_note: There's a small courtyard behind the bar. In summer, it's a great spot to enjoy a beer away from the crowd.

responses.english: Yes, there's a small courtyard out back. Nice in summer.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah oon puh-TEET koor deh-RYEHR. ah-gray-AHBL ahn ay-TAY
responses.local: Oui, il y a une petite cour derrière. Agréable en été.

phrases.text_local: Quel est le prix d'une bière ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh pree doon byair
phrases.cultural_note: Prices range from €3 for standard drafts to €30+ for rare vintage bottles. The most expensive are the older Trappists.

responses.english: Between three and ten euros depending on the beer.
responses.phonetic: ahn-truh TRWAH ay dee zuhr-OH suh-LON lah BYEHR
responses.local: Entre trois et dix euros selon la bière.
